Okay, welcome back to application funnel amplifiers. In this first lesson, we are going to go over the source code. Essentially what are we using these techniques in service of what are the milestones we're trying to coach and achieve through the techniques that we are going to be going deeper in. So we are here once again on the left side of this full process map. We are in the pre call experience where we are coaching mastery, magnetism and momentum. These are our three critical milestones that we are coaching right before that call starts, right? So that we can jump right into the call itself. Essentially with these precursors already in check, which is going to give us a lot of easefulness, naturalness and just a better call experience for ourselves and our pre clients on the phone or the zoom line with us. So that is what we are doing. And once again, your goal is to coach your pre client into experiencing genuine magnetism, mastery, which is really trust in your ability, your expertise and your unique way of doing things. And perhaps most importantly, a degree of momentum, momentum towards a point of no return where there is more friction backtracking than there is going into your program. So those are the three things as a whole that we are coaching and the main tools that we are going to be using to coach those milestones will be your application questions, your confirmation page and your pre call onboarding experience. However, this source code lesson where we are right now will help you unpack exactly what we mean by magnetism, mastery and momentum and essentially invite you to layer in whatever strategies and techniques that you believe you can integrate in service of those states and milestones. So it's more about coaching those states than it is the specific techniques that achieve them. So first milestone number one, magnetism. So magnetism is really the first sale. It's where your pre customer or lead or prospect decides that if it's going to be anyone, it's going to be you. If they're going to hire a copywriter, it's going to be you. If they're going to hire a fitness coach, it's going to be you. If they're going to hire a business coach, it's going to be you. So they've made the decision that if they are going to solve this problem, if they are going to get a solution, it's going to be through you. So you've essentially become a category of one through the magnetism they feel around you. This is extremely important because at this stage where someone is applying for a call, it's safe to assume that they are a high intent solution aware buyer who's likely to be considering several solutions and providers simultaneously. So the first sale you need to make is that if it's going to be anyone, it is going to be you. And we do this through magnetism, magnetism with you, your company, your ethos, your way of doing things. Your methods, your unique methodology around your topic. Essentially what magnetism is, it's an elevated form of resonance where not only does what you're saying ring true to them, but it actually feels awesome. It brings to them a sense of joy, a sense of relief, and a sense of surrender and trust that they will be taken care of in your presence, trust that you're going beyond in guarding their interests, not just not being predatory, but actually going beyond the call of duty and guarding their best interests and supporting their dreams, desires and goals. It comes in liking who they are and how they feel in your presence, feeling more authentic and true to themselves in your presence than they do in the rest of their day or life. That is something that is going to draw a ton of magnetism. And it's essentially believing in and loving who they can become with your help. So falling in love with this version of themselves or this version of their business that they believe they can become with you, right? This is an extremely magnetic connection that is formed when someone loves who they can become through you and your coaching and your help. So that's magnetism. That is one of the most vital things to coach in a potential lead or prospect. Next is mastery. So mastery is where they can fully relax and surrender into a state of trust that your process and expertise is uniquely suited to deliver them to that goal they want to achieve. So mastery will come through experiencing your best content and attaining both the mental and emotional breakthroughs as well as a very tangible new outcomes that come with it, right? So your content should be quite prescriptive. It should give them a chance to experience a taste of that result, not just inform them of the what on a high level, but actually give them a taste of what exactly happens when they put your mastery to the test and that will earn them the trust, earn you the trust, sorry, that if they continue down that process, they will be in safe hands. Mastery also comes in more subtle ways and the subtle cues in your copy and application pages that signal your expertise, right? If you're claiming to be a business coach or a copywriter and your pages are sloppy, they're non-specific, they're trying to talk to everybody and not talking to anybody in the process. They're white noisy. They sound like everything else out there and you're apparently a branding specialist. All these things will signal to your reader on a more subtle level if you're truly walking your talk, right? If you're actually applying and implementing the things in your own business that they would be hiring you to do for them. So these subtle keys are extremely important. And then of course, mastery will come through testimonials and case studies from trustworthy clients who speak to the results they attained, but through your specific expertise that helped them do it, right? So it's not only about the end result, it's about how they did it through your unique mastery. These are the case studies that you want to highlight and accentuate and ask your previous customers and coach them towards giving you testimonials and case studies that talk to your level of expertise and the mastery within it as part of the reason why they achieved or attained what it is they want to achieve or attain. So that is mastery. And then finally, momentum. So we want momentum towards a point of no return where there's more friction in backtracking to their old world starting from square one, then there is taking a very natural step into your program. This is key key key to that final conversion and momentum will come through your preclined making tangible investments, right? So perhaps it's related software to your industry, maybe it's setting up new systems or processes or implementing parts of your strategy, right? Where if they stop doing that and they don't go into your program, it essentially becomes a sunk cost of time, money and energy. So it's really about your preclined making time and energy investments. So many people value their time and we value what we invest our time, energy and attention on. So the more time and energy they spend involved in your process implementing parts of your teaching and your expertise, the more likely they are to move towards that point of no return. And then of course, beyond all that, it's about them experiencing genuine progress, genuine breakthroughs and the excitement, inspiration and motivation that comes through it. These are going to be the key ingredients and then entering your program. No one joins unless they're excited, inspired and motivated to do it. And your preclined must experience that through some degree of momentum. So everything remaining in a f a will be about coaching these through milestones. As I mentioned, we're going to be doing so through your application questions, your confirmation page and your pre call onboarding that could involve email, it could involve text messaging and it can involve a special strategy called the enchanting person counter, which we're going to talk about a little bit later. But just know now that everything comes back down to those three core milestones and the rest of this program, rather than us just kind of talking over slides, it's really going to be the director's commentary of how we engineered all these elements into our own application funnel for automated intimacy version 2.0. There should be some link below if you want to ever see the live version of that. But this is something that we are implementing in our own business. It's something that we've tested. It's something that we've had sound hypotheses, hypothesis is that is a terrible word to say it loud. But yeah, you're going to see how this is playing out in real time and why we've made certain decisions and implemented it the way we did. So that is all I got for you on this introduction. We are going to dive in to your application questions in the next module. So take a breather and when you're ready, meet me there.
